pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven properties to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 language features and APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag instead of separate source/target flags.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern, recommended way to compile for a specific JDK version (introduced in JDK 9), ensuring consistent compilation against the target platform's APIs.
